name: ClickUp
one_liner: Project management and productivity platform (tasks, docs, goals, time tracking) with a broad public REST API and a first-party MCP server.
access_notes: Any ClickUp account (including the Free Forever plan) can generate a non-expiring personal API token (pk_...) from Settings > Apps with no payment or approval. OAuth2 apps for multi-user integrations are also self-serve for workspace admins. Working credentials are immediately available on free accounts.
api_notes: REST API with v2 and v3 versions and a published OpenAPI spec. Covers tasks, lists, folders, spaces, comments, checklists, time tracking, goals, custom fields, docs, views, members, and webhooks - well over 100 operations. An llms.txt index is provided for AI agents.
mcp_notes: ClickUp ships a first-party, official MCP server (public beta) at https://mcp.clickup.com/mcp, documented on developer.clickup.com. Exposes ~40 tools across search, tasks, time tracking, chat, and docs. Auth is OAuth only (no personal token). Available on all plans; rate limits vary (50 calls/24h on Free, 300 on Unlimited+ without the Everything AI add-on). A popular community server (taazkareem/clickup-mcp-server) also exists.
main_blocker: None significant - public REST API with self-serve free credentials. Only caveat is per-plan rate limits.

evidence.claim: ClickUp API supports non-expiring personal tokens (pk_) and OAuth2 authorization code grant; tokens generated free from Settings > Apps.
ClickUp ships an official first-party MCP server at https://mcp.clickup.com/mcp exposing ~40 tools, available on all plans.
ClickUp supports REST webhooks covering task, list, folder, space, and goal events with wildcard subscription.

open_questions: Exact total operation count across v2/v3 not enumerated; some v3 endpoints (Docs, Chat) may still be in beta.
